name: claude-api
tagline: Reference for the Claude/Anthropic API: model IDs, pricing, auth, streaming, tool use, MCP, caching, and model migration guidance.
verdict: Extremely thorough, internally consistent Claude API reference with strong triggers, concrete examples, and good failure-path coverage; no security red flags found. Main weaknesses are packaging: SKILL.md is ~73KB (nearly 3x budget), the frontmatter description is oversized, and there is no version/changelog signal to track changes over time.

highlights.summary: Vertex client install shown as an unpinned extra of the official anthropic PyPI package; well-known publisher so warning not fail.
Main file still carries ~40 dense pitfall bullets plus many full inline Quick Reference sections that parallel existing shared/*.md files.
Description runs to roughly 1000+ chars across 3 dense paragraphs incl. an embedded grep command, well past the 1-5 sentence sizing guidance.
